race.description: Wally Cross & Jack Brennan Maiden Hcp
race.comment: SIKKA (5) is a filly by Snitzel on debut for the premier metro stable. She's been well-trialled, and Lang rides from an inside gate. Profiles well in this lineup, and it will be a surprise if she doesn't feature. SWEET ARMANI (9) switched from the Currie yard and was terrible when heavily-backed at Toowoomba 48 days ago off a 34-day freshen. Has trialled well at the Sunshine Coast since and jumps from a low gate. Has the ability and deserves another chance. KIRKSVILLE (4) resumes and has switched from a top Victorian stable. Has a near miss at Bendigo in the CV. He's trialled okay, and the betting moves should tell the story. TOO DARN SMART (7) resumes and has switched yards. Has the inside barrier and Butler, and we're likely to see more from him.
